headline: FactSet (FDS) Launches Portfolio Analytics MCP For AI Driven Investment Workflows
summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) has launched Portfolio Analytics MCP, a new product that brings its audit approved portfolio analytics into conversational and agentic AI tools. The launch connects FactSet analytics to AI native workflows, including support for clients’ private large language models and developer focused integrations. FactSet Research Systems is best known for providing data and analytics to investment professionals, and this launch extends that core role into AI driven...
